introSection: Wilde Maus is a travelling steel wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack Rides currently owned by German showman Göbel.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Dark pink track with green supports. A mirror-image of the typical Mack mobile Wilde Maus - this roller coaster has the lift hill on the left.

fullText:
Wilde Maus is a travelling steel wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack Rides currently owned by German showman Göbel.

Dark pink track with green supports. A mirror-image of the typical Mack mobile Wilde Maus - this roller coaster has the lift hill on the left.
